description: CompositionNavy blue polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves and appliqué work on the left chestFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroiderySignature tee from quiksilver that makes for a stylish add to your casual style arsenal. The tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe. You could wear it with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the great outdoors. Style it with casual shoes and an understated belt.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
